transcript: Speaker A: Poor English. Improve korte chai. [Poor English. I want to improve.] Speaker B: Tumi bolte chaho, "I want to improve my English skills." [You want to say, "I want to improve my English skills."] Speaker A: Heh heh, ki bhabe? [Yes, how?] Speaker B: English improve korte hole tomake emon ekta environment-e thakte hobe jekhane tumi freely practice korte paro. [To improve English, you need to be in an environment where you can practice freely.] Speaker A: Friend nei, taka-o nei. [No friends, no money either.] Speaker B: Human teacher-er bodole AI English tutor-er sathe practice koro. [Instead of a human teacher, practice with an AI English tutor.] Speaker A: Tara kothay? [Where are they?] Speaker B: MySivi-te tumi AI teacher Arya-r sathe practice korte parbe ebong English bolay better hote parbe. [On MySivi, you can practice with AI teacher Arya and get better at speaking English.] Speaker A: Khub expensive hobe na? [Won't it be very expensive?] Speaker B: Amader AI teacher human teacher-er theke 7x sosta ebong 24/7 available. Tai amader kache 5 million-er besi learner ache 150 ta desh theke. [Our AI teacher is 7x cheaper than a human teacher and available 24/7. That's why we have over 5 million learners from 150 countries.] Speaker A: Install MySivi now.
on_screen_text: Poor English, Improve korte, Tumi bolte chaho, I want to improve, my English skills, English improve, korte hole tomake, emon ekta environment-e, thakte hobe jekhane, tumi freely practice, NO FRIENDS, NO MONEY, Human teacher-er, bodole, AI English tutor-er, sathe practice, Tara, kothay, MySivi, Arya AI Teacher, Practice Now, Fluency Score, Your Learning Path, Talk about anything, Daily routine, Let's Improve Vocabulary, Talk about your childhood, Seasons and weather, Family and Relationships, better hote parbe, Khub expensive, hobe na, 7X Cheap, 24/7 Available, 5 Million, 150 ta desh theke, Install MySivi, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A Bengali speaker wants to improve her English but lacks money and practice partners. An AI avatar introduces MySivi, an affordable AI-powered English tutoring app available 24/7. The ad ends with a call to install the app.
